div.p: Raft was explicitly designed for understandability, not novelty.

ul.li: Zab: Strong leader model, Epoch concepts.

ol.li: Decomposition: Separated leader election, replication, and safety.
Reduced States: Only 3 roles (Follower, Candidate, Leader).
Deterministic: Minimized non-determinism using randomized timeouts.
Safety Rule: Term-first log commitment for election safety.

g.text: Strong Leader Model: All requests -> leader
